# Antiplatelet Agents (antiplatelets)

**23 rules.** Category: hematology

|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `andrographis` | ingredient_quality_map | caution | probable | May add to antiplatelet effects | Additive platelet inhibition via PAF antagonism and suppression of TXA2 synthesis. Combined use with aspirin, clopidogrel, or other antiplatelets may increase bleeding risk. |

| `chamomile` | ingredient_quality_map | monitor | theoretical | May add to antiplatelet effects | Chamomile flavonoids (apigenin, quercetin) may inhibit platelet aggregation through various mechanisms. Clinical significance at typical chamomile tea consumption levels is low. |
